calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Continued To Oct-28-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.*** The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the entire complaint is sustained without leave to amend.

Defendant's unopposed request for judicial notice is Granted.

Plaintiff Caleb Azucena failed to plead compliance with the claims presentation requirement of the Government Claims Act or an excuse for not doing so and has not argued or suggested that he is able to do so, making leave to amend futile. (State of California v. Superior Court (2004) 32 Cal.4th 1234, 1243 ["we conclude that a plaintiff must allege facts demonstrating or excusing compliance with the claim presentation requirement."].)

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

***At 10:04am, Mr. Caleb Azucena appears. The Court announces Mr. Azucena did not comply with the tentative ruling rule, informs him of the ruling of the court and to go get some help re a motion for reconsideration.***

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Continued To Aug-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Continued to August 18, 2025, to allow for consideration of Plaintiff's belated 7/18/25 opposition. A reply brief, if any, shall be due five court days before the new hearing date.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/GLW)
